dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.browserModeDesc: You are previewing this app in a browser. Full features require running in Electron.

providers.title: Provider Management
providers.subtitle: Manage your API provider configurations and accounts
providers.supportedModelsHelp: Click to add or remove models
providers.credentialFieldsHelp: Click to add or remove credential fields
providers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
providers.confirmDeleteAccount: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
providers.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting search criteria or filters
providers.clickToAddProvider: Click the button above to add your first provider
providers.manageAllAccounts: Manage all accounts under this provider
providers.selectProvider: Select a built-in provider, the system will guide you through authentication
providers.createCustomProviderDesc: Configure your own API provider with multiple authentication methods
providers.clickToOpenOAuth: Click the button below to open OAuth login window
providers.oauthAutoCapture: Token will be automatically captured after login
providers.clearChatsConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history for this account?
providers.clearChatsWarning: This will delete all conversation history on this provider's website and cannot be undone.
providers.clearChatsOnlyForQwenAI: This feature is only available for Kimi, Qwen, Qwen AI, MiniMax, Z.ai, Perplexity, DeepSeek, GLM, and Mimo providers
providers.guestAccountNotAllowed: Guest account not allowed, please login with a real account
providers.loginWindowAlreadyOpen: A login window is already open
providers.updateModelsNotSupported: This provider does not support dynamic model updates

loginGuide.getTokenDesc: Please follow these steps to get authentication credentials
loginGuide.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.description: DeepSeek AI assistant, supports deep thinking and web search
deepseek.userTokenHelp: Authentication Token from DeepSeek web version, found in browser DevTools Application -> Local Storage -> userToken

glm.name: GLM
glm.description: Zhipu Qingyan AI Assistant, supports GLM-5.2 and GLM-5.1 models, deep thinking and web search
glm.refreshTokenHelp: Get chatglm_refresh_token from Zhipu Qingyan web version, found in browser DevTools Application -> Cookie

kimi.name: Kimi
kimi.description: Kimi AI assistant, supports long text processing and web search
kimi.accessTokenPlaceholder: Enter Kimi Access Token or Refresh Token
kimi.accessTokenHelp: The kimi-auth value from browser cookies (recommended), or JWT Token / refresh_token

minimax.name: MiniMax
minimax.description: MiniMax Hailuo AI, supports voice conversation and agents
minimax.tokenPlaceholder: Enter MiniMax JWT Token (starts with eyJ)
minimax.tokenHelp: JWT Token obtained from browser developer tools
minimax.jwtTokenHelp: Get from browser DevTools -> Application -> Local Storage -> agent.minimaxi.com -> _token
minimax.realUserIDHelp: If left empty, will extract from JWT Token. If authentication fails, please enter the correct Real User ID manually

qwen.name: Qwen
qwen.description: Tongyi Qianwen AI assistant by Alibaba Cloud, supports deep thinking and code modes
qwen.ssoTicketHelp: SSO Ticket obtained from Qwen website (www.qianwen.com), found in browser DevTools Application -> Cookies as tongyi_sso_ticket
qwen.deepThinkingDesc: Enable deep thinking mode for more thorough reasoning analysis
qwen.codeModeDesc: Use Qwen-Coder model, specialized for programming tasks

qwen-ai.name: Qwen AI (International)
qwen-ai.description: Qwen AI international version (chat.qwen.ai), supports thinking mode with reasoning output
qwen-ai.tokenHelp: JWT token obtained from chat.qwen.ai Local Storage (key: "token")
qwen-ai.cookiesHelp: Full cookie string from browser DevTools (optional but recommended)
qwen-ai.thinkingModeDesc: Enable thinking mode to get reasoning process before answer

zai.name: Z.ai
zai.description: Z.ai - Free AI Chatbot powered by GLM-5.1, GLM-5, and GLM-4.7
zai.tokenHelp: Get token from Z.ai web version, found in browser DevTools Application -> Cookie, starts with "eyJ..."

mimo.name: Mimo
mimo.description: XiaomiMIMO - Xiaomi General Intelligence Foundation Model
mimo.serviceTokenHelp: Get from browser DevTools -> Application -> Cookies -> serviceToken
mimo.userIdHelp: Get from browser DevTools -> Application -> Cookies -> userId
mimo.phTokenHelp: Get from browser DevTools -> Application -> Cookies -> xiaomichatbot_ph

perplexity.name: Perplexity
perplexity.description: Perplexity AI search assistant with multi-model support and web search enhancement
perplexity.sessionTokenHelp: Get __Secure-next-auth.session-token Cookie from browser DevTools, or switch to OAuth Login tab for automatic extraction
perplexity.freeUserNotice: Official free users: Auto model only, auto routing

proxy.title: Proxy Settings
proxy.description: Configure API proxy service parameters and management policies
proxy.basicConfigDesc: Configure basic parameters for proxy service
proxy.advancedConfigDesc: Configure timeout, retry, and logging options
proxy.autoStartHelp: Automatically start proxy service when app launches
proxy.modelMappingDesc: Map request models to actual models used
proxy.confirmRestoreDefaults: Restoring defaults will remove custom model mappings and rewrite the built-in mappings. Continue?
proxy.builtInMappingReadonly: Built-in mappings are managed by the system and cannot be edited or deleted
proxy.noMappingsDesc: Click "Add Mapping" to create a new model mapping
proxy.wildcardMappingDesc: Support using * as wildcard to match multiple models
proxy.addMappingDesc: Configure request model to actual model mapping rules
proxy.requestModelHelp: Model name requested by client, supports wildcard *
proxy.actualModelHelp: Actual model name sent to provider
proxy.requestActualModelRequired: Request model and actual model cannot be empty
proxy.mappingExists: Mapping rule already exists for this request model
proxy.configSaveFailed: Failed to save configuration, please try again
proxy.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
proxy.unsavedChangesHint: You have unsaved changes, click save button to save
proxy.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved model mapping changes. If you leave, these changes will be lost.
proxy.invalidIpOrHostname: Please enter a valid IP address or hostname
proxy.bindAddressHelp: 0.0.0.0 allows all network access, 127.0.0.1 for local only
proxy.enableCorsHelp: Allow cross-origin requests to access proxy service
proxy.corsOriginHelp: Use * to allow all origins, or comma-separate multiple domains
proxy.fixFormErrors: Please fix the errors in the form
proxy.loadBalanceConfigDesc: Configure account selection strategy and weight distribution
proxy.roundRobinDesc: Use each available account in sequence for even request distribution
proxy.fillFirstDesc: Prioritize current account until limit reached, then switch to next
proxy.failoverDesc: Automatically skip failed accounts. Switch to other accounts after 3 consecutive failures, auto-recover after 1 minute
proxy.weightHelp: Higher weight means higher probability of selection. Only effective in round-robin strategy.
proxy.addAndActivateAccount: Please add and activate accounts first
proxy.timeoutHelp: Maximum wait time for a single request (1-300 seconds)
proxy.retryCountMustBeNumber: Retry count must be a number
proxy.retryCountHelp: Automatic retry count after request failure (0-10 times)
proxy.debugLevelDesc: Output all logs, suitable for development debugging
proxy.infoLevelDesc: Output info level and above logs
proxy.warnLevelDesc: Output warning and error logs only
proxy.retentionDaysMustBeNumber: Retention days must be a number
proxy.logRetentionHelp: Logs older than this will be automatically cleaned up (1-365 days)
proxy.injectionModeAutoDesc: Automatically choose the backend tool calling mode; built-in managed providers use unified injection and parsing
proxy.injectionModeAlwaysDesc: Always inject tool prompts (may cause duplicates)
proxy.injectionModeSmartDesc: Only inject tool prompts for complex queries
proxy.clientDetectionDesc: Identify the client source and let backend provider profiles decide the tool calling strategy
proxy.restartRequiredDesc: Port or bind address has changed. The proxy service needs to restart for the changes to take effect. Restart now?
proxy.proxyRestarted: Proxy service has been restarted with new configuration
proxy.fixFormErrors: Please fix the errors in the form

apiKeys.title: API Key Management
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for proxy service authentication
apiKeys.apiKeyAuthDesc: When enabled, all requests require a valid API Key
apiKeys.clickToCreate: Click the button above to create a new API Key
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.createApiKeyDesc: Create a new API Key for proxy service authentication
apiKeys.apiKeyCreatedDesc: Please save your API Key securely. You won't be able to see the full key again after closing.
apiKeys.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this API Key?
apiKeys.keyNameRequired: API Key name cannot be empty

logs.title: Logs
logs.clearConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all logs? This action cannot be undone.
logs.browserModeNotSupported: Browser mode does not support export

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeSettingsDesc: Customize the appearance theme of the application
settings.languageSettingsDesc: Set the display language of the application
settings.sidebarSettingsDesc: Configure the default behavior of the sidebar
settings.sidebarCollapsedHelp: Collapse sidebar by default on startup for larger workspace
settings.autoStartHelp: Automatically run app on system startup
settings.autoStartProxyHelp: Automatically start proxy service when app launches
settings.minimizeToTrayHelp: Minimize to system tray when closing window
settings.oauthProxyModeHelp: Set network proxy mode for OAuth login
settings.logRetentionHelp: Logs older than this will be automatically cleaned
settings.maxLogsHelp: Oldest logs will be cleaned when exceeded
settings.requestLogEnabledHelp: Store structured request logs for diagnostics and statistics
settings.requestLogMaxEntriesHelp: Keep only the newest persisted request logs. Set to 0 to disable storage.
settings.requestLogIncludeBodiesHelp: Store request and response bodies in request logs
settings.requestLogMaxBodyCharsHelp: Maximum characters persisted per request or response body
settings.requestLogRedactSensitiveHelp: Mask tokens, cookies, API keys, and similar secrets before persisting
settings.importSuccess: Configuration imported successfully. Some settings require app restart.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: These actions are irreversible, please proceed with caution
settings.confirmResetDesc: This will clear all settings and data. The application will return to its initial state. This action cannot be undone.
settings.appDesc: Multi-platform AI Service Unified Management Tool
settings.upToDate: Current version is up to date
settings.updateCheckFailed: Unable to connect to update server
settings.openSourceLicenseDesc: Open source licenses used by this project
settings.acknowledgmentsDesc: Thanks to the following open source projects

managementApi.title: Management API
managementApi.description: Configure the Management API for programmatic access to platform settings
managementApi.enableDescription: When enabled, allows configuration via REST API endpoints
managementApi.secretKeyDescription: Use this key in the Authorization header as Bearer token
managementApi.generateConfirm: Are you sure you want to generate a new secret key? The current key will be invalidated.
managementApi.generateError: Failed to generate new secret key
managementApi.warning: Keep your secret key secure. Do not share it with unauthorized parties.

oauth.selectLoginMethod: Select login method to get access credentials
oauth.tokenStoredLocally: Token is stored locally only, not uploaded to server
oauth.clickToOpenBrowser: Click the button below to open browser for login, after successful login please follow the instructions to get Token
oauth.step3: Switch to Application or Storage tab
oauth.step4: Find the corresponding Token or Cookie
oauth.step5: Copy and paste to Manual Input tab
oauth.enterAllTokens: Please fill in all required tokens

models.title: Model Management
models.description: View and manage available models and model mapping configuration
models.noModelsDesc: Please add providers and accounts first

modelEditor.title: Model Management - {{name}}
modelEditor.warningMessage: The actual model ID must be obtained from the provider's official page. Incorrect ID will cause chat failures. Please confirm the model ID on the official page before adding.
modelEditor.displayNameHelp: Model name used by AI client
modelEditor.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset to default? This will remove all custom models and exclusion settings.
modelEditor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this model?

about.tagline: Multi-platform AI Service Unified Management Tool
about.credits: Made with ❤️ by the Open Source Community
about.builtWith: Built with Electron, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, Koa and other amazing open source projects.

prompts.title: Function Calling Simulation
prompts.description: Enables tool calling for models without native Function Calling support
prompts.overviewDesc: View function calling status and support information
prompts.toolUseEnabled: Function calling is enabled. The server uses provider profiles to convert tool definitions, inject prompts, and parse model output.
prompts.toolUseDisabled: Tool prompt injection is disabled, tool calling is handled by the client
prompts.protocolFormatTooltip: Only for diagnosing custom providers not covered by provider profiles. Built-in priority providers use backend profiles for tool calling.
prompts.bracketFormatDesc: Only for inspecting old output, not a tool calling path for priority providers
prompts.providerProfileNotice: DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, and Qwen use backend provider profiles for tool calling. Priority providers use Chat2API XML.
prompts.modeAutoDesc: Automatically choose the backend tool calling mode. Built-in managed providers use server-side injection and parsing even for Cherry Studio, Kilo Code, or Cline.
prompts.modeAlwaysDesc: Use server-managed prompt injection and parsing for every request that includes tools.
prompts.modeNeverDesc: Disable server-side prompt injection, let client handle tool calling entirely
prompts.enableToolCallParsingDesc: Parse tool calls from model output and convert to OpenAI format
prompts.promptTemplateTooltip: Custom prompt template guides the model on how to output tool calls. Leave empty to use the provider profile template. Supports variables: {{tools}} (server-rendered tool instructions), {{tool_names}} (tool names list), {{format}} (protocol ID)
prompts.customTemplatePlaceholder:
Enter custom prompt template...

Available variables:
- {{tools}}: Server-rendered tool instructions
- {{tool_names}}: Tool names list
- {{format}}: Backend protocol identifier
prompts.thresholdDesc: Injection triggers when user message length exceeds this value (smart mode)
prompts.triggerKeywordsDesc: Messages containing these keywords will trigger injection
prompts.clientDetectionDesc: Identify the client source and let backend provider profiles decide the tool calling strategy
prompts.skipInjectionHint: When enabled, the backend provider profile decides whether to inject prompts and parse tool calls for this client
prompts.injectionBehaviorDesc: How to handle existing client-injected prompts
prompts.behaviorSkipDesc: Skip server injection, keep client's original prompts
prompts.behaviorReplaceDesc: Remove client prompts, use server injection instead
prompts.behaviorAppendDesc: Append server prompts, may cause duplicate or conflicting prompts
prompts.variantDesc: Optimized prompt templates for different providers
prompts.autoSelectDesc: Automatically select the best variant based on provider
prompts.variantDefaultDesc: Universal prompt template for all providers
prompts.variantPerplexityDesc: Optimized prompts for Perplexity, disables auto-search, enforces tool call format
prompts.variantHint: Select 'Auto Select' to automatically match the appropriate prompt variant based on provider type.
prompts.promptContentDesc: View and edit the prompt template for the current variant

toolCalling.title: Tool Calling
toolCalling.description: Managed tool calling for OpenAI-compatible clients backed by web providers.

clients.standardOpenAiToolsDesc: Use this for generic OpenAI-compatible clients and SDKs.
clients.cherryStudioMcpDesc: Use this for Cherry Studio MCP tools. Exact MCP tool names are preserved.

smoke.title: Smoke test
smoke.description: Generate a minimal weather tool-call fixture through the local management API.

advanced.title: Advanced diagnostics
advanced.description: Prompt preview, parser diagnostics, and experimental templates.
advanced.promptPreviewDesc: Show generated managed prompt details in diagnostics.

session.title: Session Management
session.deleteAfterChatHint: Automatically delete web-side chat history after each conversation

contextManagement.title: Context Management
contextManagement.enableContextManagementHint: Automatically manage conversation context to prevent exceeding model limits
contextManagement.configSaveFailed: Failed to save context management configuration

slidingWindow.title: Context Count
slidingWindow.description: Keep recent N messages, always preserve system messages
slidingWindow.maxMessagesHint: Maximum number of messages to keep (1-100)

tokenLimit.title: Max Tokens
tokenLimit.description: Truncate history by token count, always preserve system messages
tokenLimit.maxTokensHint: Maximum number of tokens to keep (100-100000)

summary.title: Summary Compression
summary.description: Generate summary for early conversation, keep recent messages and summary
summary.keepRecentMessagesHint: Number of recent messages not included in summary
summary.customPromptHint: Leave empty to use default prompt
